description: TEM-1 beta-lactamase (gene bla, UniProt P62593) -- the 286-aa class A serine beta-lactamase precursor that confers ampicillin resistance, the canonical AmpR selection marker.

label: bla
note: TEM-1 beta-lactamase (gene bla, UniProt P62593) -- the 286-aa class A serine beta-lactamase precursor that confers ampicillin resistance, the canonical AmpR selection marker.

label: Signal peptide
note: 23-aa Sec-dependent leader (UniProt P62593 SIGNAL 1-23); cleaved between Ala23 and His24 so the mature periplasmic TEM-1 enzyme begins at His24 (Ambler posit...

label: Catalytic nucleophile Ser
note: Active-site serine = Ambler Ser70, the acylating nucleophile that attacks the beta-lactam carbonyl.

label: Catalytic general base Lys
note: Lys of the S-T-F-K box = Ambler Lys73 (proton acceptor); fourth residue of the STFK box (seq[70:71]='K').

label: SDN loop catalytic Ser
note: Ser of the class A signature S-D-N loop = Ambler Ser130 (proton donor); first residue of the SDN motif (seq[127:130]='SDN').

label: Omega-loop catalytic Glu
note: Omega-loop Glu = Ambler Glu166 (proton acceptor), the conserved omega-loop residue that, with Asn170, forms the H-bond network activating the catalytic water...

label: Substrate-binding K-S-G
note: Conserved class A K-T-G/K-S-G triad = Ambler Lys234-Ser235-Gly236; anchors the substrate carboxylate and helps orient substrate near the oxyanion hole.

label: Disulfide bond Cys-Cys
note: First partner of the single mature-protein disulfide = Ambler Cys77 (seq[74]='C'), bonded to Cys at index 120 (Ambler Cys123).

label: Disulfide bond Cys-Cys (Cys123)
note: Second partner of the mature disulfide = Ambler Cys123 (seq[120]='C'), bonded to Cys77 (index 74).

functional_claims.label: Confers ampicillin (beta-lactam) resistance (TEM-1 class A serine beta-lactamase).

source.quote: TEM-1 beta-lactamase (gene bla, UniProt P62593) -- the 286-aa class A serine beta-lactamase precursor that confers ampicillin resistance, the canonical AmpR selection marker.
